visits.note: Patient P087 is a 55-year-old male presenting with Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, and Hyperlipidemia. He reports fatigue, polyuria, and polydipsia. BP is 140/90 mmHg and HbA1c is 7.2%. LDL is 130 mg/dL. He is prescribed Metformin 500mg BD and Simvastatin 20mg QHS.

Patient P087 returns with worsening symptoms of fatigue and increased urination. BP is now 150/95 mmHg and HbA1c has risen to 8.1%. LDL remains elevated at 140 mg/dL. He is prescribed Lisinopril 2.5mg QD for hypertension and Atorvastatin 40mg QHS for hyperlipidemia.

Patient P087 has made little progress with his chronic conditions. HbA1c has risen to 8.8% and BP remains elevated at 160/100 mmHg. LDL has decreased to 120 mg/dL. He is prescribed Sitagliptin 100mg QD for Type 2 Diabetes and Furosemide 40mg QD for edema.
